creator: freebsd@bilteks.com
text:
Reference from http://www.freebsd.org/where.html to 'Installation
Notes' point to wrong place http://www.freebsd.org/releases/7.0R/installation.html

Fix: 

Place appropriate installation.html and installation.txt in distribution tree
How-To-Repeat: http://www.freebsd.org/where.html
click on 'Installation
Notes'
